revision.comment: Auto-generated page
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Ja-rail-color/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: /* Valid parameters */
1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Ja-rail-color/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Ja-rail-color/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Ja-rail-color/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects J]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Ja-rail-color/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects J]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[en:Template:Ja-rail-color/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects J]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects J]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]] on (CatAlot)
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Ja-rail-color/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects J]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects J]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Ja-rail-color/doc]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "#redirect[[en:Template" to "#redirect[[:en:Template"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Ja-rail-color/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects J]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects J]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects J]][[en:Ja-rail-color/doc]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects J]]

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
